---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible defect in Bizarre CRM
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error messages, stack traces, or screenshots where possible.

## Environment

- **CRM version / commit:** (e.g. `main@abc1234`)
- **Node.js version:** (e.g. `22.11.0`)
- **Browser / client:** (e.g. `Chrome 130`, `Android app 1.2.3`, `iOS app 1.1.0`)
- **OS:** (e.g. `Windows 11`, `macOS 14.6`)
- **Deployment:** (self-hosted / staging / dev)

## Logs

```
Paste relevant server logs (packages/server/logs/) or browser console output.
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us reproduce — screenshots, related tickets, recent changes.

## Security

If this bug involves a security vulnerability, **do not** file it here. Email `security@bizarreelectronics.com` instead (see `SECURITY.md`).
